chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 402 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.6 & 26. 2. For orders on CMA No.1740/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 09.10.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Tayyaba Kayani - Collector, Mr. Farhadullah Khan - Deputy Collector & Mr. Tariq Aziz - Assistant Collector, MCC PMBQ. Reference is dismissed as withdrawn. The presence and assistance of learned officers is appreciated. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
